ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "prcp" REAL /* Precipitation amount (in inches) */,
  "snwd" REAL /* Snow depth (in inches) */,
  "snow" REAL /* Snowfall amount (in inches) */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature (in Celsius) */,
  "tmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature (in Celsius) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "sunrise" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_data" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trip data */,
  "num_trips" INTEGER /* Number of trips taken on that date */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation mode */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in miles or kilometers */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_data_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES transportation_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_data_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_trip_correlation" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the correlation analysis */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip data record */,
  "correlation_value" REAL /* Correlation value between weather and trip data */,
  "correlation_type" TEXT /* Type of correlation */,
  "correlation_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the correlation */,
  "correlation_description" TEXT /* Description of the correlation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_trip_correlation_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trip_data ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_trip_correlation_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the station is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance */,
  "sensor_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the sensors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transportation mode */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the transportation mode */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the transportation mode */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* URL accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
